template: Hey [Name], saw you're [context]. I help [target_buyer] [value_proposition] in [timeframe]. [specific_benefit]. Want to see [proof]? (Takes [time])
example: Hey [Name], saw you're launching a course. I help course creators get launch-ready in 48 hours: landing page, email sequence, traffic plan, checkout setup. Done-for-you. Want to see 2 examples? (Takes 2 min)
